OPENCTI_URL.description: The base URL of the OpenCTI instance.

OPENCTI_TOKEN.description: The API token to connect to OpenCTI.

CONNECTOR_SCOPE.description: The scope or type of data the connector is importing.

CONNECTOR_LOG_LEVEL.description: The minimum level of logs to display.

CONNECTOR_DURATION_PERIOD.description: The period of time to await between two runs of the connector in ISO 8601 duration format.

TI_API__EXTRA_SETTINGS__IGNORE_NON_INDIC.description: Ignore threat reports that do not contain indicators.
Ignore threats that do not contain indicators.

TI_API__EXTRA_SETTINGS__IGNORE_NON_MALWA.description: Ignore DDoS attacks that are not related to malware.

TI_API__EXTRA_SETTINGS__INTRUSION_SET_IN.description: Use Intrusion Set instead of Threat Actor for APT groups.

TI_API__EXTRA_SETTINGS__SCHEDULE_TIME.description: Scheduled time for collection processing (HH:MM format).

TI_API__EXTRA_SETTINGS__TIME_OUTPUT_FORM.description: Output format for timestamps in logs.

TI_API__EXTRA_SETTINGS__ENABLE_STATEMENT.description: Enable statement marking on created STIX objects.

TI_API__COLLECTIONS__APT_THREAT__ENABLE.description: Enable the APT Threat collection (indicators and MITRE ATT&CK matrix).

TI_API__COLLECTIONS__APT_THREAT__DEFAULT.description: Start date for APT Threat collection (e.g. 2025-01-01). Leave empty to use default.

TI_API__COLLECTIONS__APT_THREAT__LOCAL_C.description: Custom tag to apply to APT Threat collection objects.

TI_API__COLLECTIONS__APT_THREAT__TTL.description: Time-to-live in days for APT Threat collection objects.

TI_API__COLLECTIONS__APT_THREAT__USE_HUN.description: Enable hunting rules for APT Threat collection.

TI_API__COLLECTIONS__APT_THREAT_ACTOR__E.description: Enable the APT Threat Actor collection (cybercriminal groups).

TI_API__COLLECTIONS__APT_THREAT_ACTOR__D.description: Start date for APT Threat Actor collection.

TI_API__COLLECTIONS__APT_THREAT_ACTOR__L.description: Custom tag to apply to APT Threat Actor collection objects.

TI_API__COLLECTIONS__APT_THREAT_ACTOR__T.description: Time-to-live in days for APT Threat Actor collection objects.

TI_API__COLLECTIONS__ATTACKS_DDOS__DEFAU.description: Start date for DDoS Attacks collection.

TI_API__COLLECTIONS__ATTACKS_DDOS__LOCAL.description: Custom tag to apply to DDoS Attacks collection objects.

TI_API__COLLECTIONS__ATTACKS_DDOS__TTL.description: Time-to-live in days for DDoS Attacks collection objects.

TI_API__COLLECTIONS__ATTACKS_DEFACE__LOC.description: Custom tag to apply to Deface Attacks collection objects.

TI_API__COLLECTIONS__ATTACKS_DEFACE__TTL.description: Time-to-live in days for Deface Attacks collection objects.
